description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the ruby:2.3 Docker image and set the variable JEKYLL_ENV to production. Include a before_script that runs bundle install for every job. Define two stages: test and deploy. Add a test job in the test stage that executes bundle exec jekyll build -d test, stores the test directory as an artifact, and runs on all branches except master. Add a pages job in the deploy stage that runs bundle exec jekyll build -d public, publishes the public directory as a GitLab Pages artifact, and only runs on the master branch.
